function.name: weather_get_current_weather
function.description: Get current weather data for a locality.

locality.description: the name of the locality for which weather data will be retrieved.

function.name: weather_get_forecast
function.description: Get the daily weather forecast for the next few days in the requested location.

locality.description: the name of the locality for which the daily weather forecast will be retrieved.

days.description: the number of days we want the forecast for, starting from the current date, not included.

function.name: weather_get_today_forecast
function.description: Get the hourly weather forecast for today in the requested location.

locality.description: the name of the locality for which the hourly weather forecast will be retrieved.
